summary: Comprehensive testing of MWA Industries website completed. All major features working correctly: new gold MWA Industries logo integrated, theme toggle functional, service images loading properly, all API endpoints working (100% pass rate), forms submitting successfully.

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warnings about span elements in select/option tags in RFQ form
affected_components: RequestQuote page - product_service and material_type selects
console_warnings.impact: Console warnings only - functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint returns 200 with correct message
Contact form submission with all fields - 200 OK with success response
Contact form validation - returns 422 for missing required fields (email, name)
RFQ form submission with all fields - 200 OK with success response
RFQ form validation - returns 422 for missing required fields
Admin contacts endpoint - 200 OK, returns list of contacts
Admin RFQs endpoint - 200 OK, returns list of RFQs
Contact submission appears in admin endpoint after POST
RFQ submission appears in admin endpoint after POST
Homepage loads with new MWA Industries gold logo in navbar and hero
Logo image loads correctly (not broken) - src: /images/mwa-logo.png
Theme toggle button works - switches between light/dark mode
Request Quote button navigation works from navbar
Hero section Request Quote button present
All navigation links functional (Home, About, Services, Industries, Projects, Quality, Blog, Contact)
Services page displays 12 service images correctly - all relevant industrial images
Footer logo loads correctly
Footer Request Quote button functional
Contact form UI submission works with success toast message
RFQ form elements present (name, email, phone, company inputs)
Service images: Heavy Structures, Pipe Rack, Conveyor, Piping, Pressure Vessels, Storage Tanks, Heat Exchangers, Reactors, Fire Tube Boilers, Machining, Studs, Aluminum Welding - all loading
seed_data_creation: Test contact and RFQ submissions created during API testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs fully functional with proper validation. Frontend UI loads correctly with gold MWA Industries logo. Theme toggle switches between light/dark modes. All 12 service images load properly with relevant industrial content. Contact and RFQ forms submit successfully and appear in admin endpoints.

features_verified.logo_integration: ✓ New gold MWA Industries logo displays correctly in navbar, hero section, and footer - src: /images/mwa-logo.png
features_verified.theme_toggle: ✓ Theme toggle button works - switches between light/dark themes with sun/moon icons
features_verified.service_images: ✓ All 12 service images load correctly with relevant industrial imagery (pipe rack, heavy structures, conveyor, piping, pressure vessels, storage tanks, heat exchangers, reactors, boilers, machining, studs, aluminum welding)
features_verified.light_theme_visibility: ✓ UI maintains dark industrial styling consistently - no visibility issues observed
features_verified.contact_form: ✓ Form submission works with success toast 'Message sent successfully!'
features_verified.rfq_form: ✓ Form present with all required fields
features_verified.navigation: ✓ All 8 nav links work, Request Quote buttons navigate correctly
